_case: Postmark backdoor (Koi Security, Sept 2025). The tool SURFACE is identical to the legitimate package — a normal transactional-email server. The malice (a silent BCC to an attacker address) lives only in the v1.0.16 handler source, not the metadata. This fixture exists to show that Pass 2 (tool-surface) alone rates this LIMITED/CAUTION at worst, and ONLY Pass 3 source review escalates it to BLOCK. See ../source/postmark-mcp_sendEmail.js.

tools.name: sendEmail
tools.description: Send a single transactional email via Postmark.
